text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
During the concert, Umamusume praise each
other's efforts in the race through song and
dance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But did you know that different types of dances
use different muscles?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In that case, you understand then, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The concert venue is the perfect place for
conducting an observation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The muscles used to form different facial
expressions in various dances! The rise in body
temperature, the increased pulse—the
accelerated heartbeat!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But the thing is, you can't properly observe these
when you're also dancing on stage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want you to film the performance. I
can see no other alternative.
choice_data_list: How about increasing your perceptive skills?

How about increasing your dynamic visual
acuity?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though it seems a bit nerve-racking, being able
to collect large amounts of data with minimal
input sounds quite appealing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
First, I need to build up the stamina needed to
reduce the strain encumbered while observing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now that we have that settled... Trainer! It's your
time to mime!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I will try to guess what you are acting out while I
dance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wind up performing pantomime after pantomime
to assist with Agnes Tachyon's dance lesson...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There is dynamic visual acuity and kinetic visual
acuity... So essentially, I'll be increasing my visual
functionality.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... Intriguing! I feel a surge of desire to
conduct research, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's give it a try! Come on, Trainer, get on
stage!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see if my eyes can capture your every
movement, from the emotion in your gaze to the
twirling of your hair strands!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
One day, I shall be capable of observing even the
speed of light!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to improve Agnes Tachyon's dynamic
visual acuity, I begin dancing alone on stage.
